Title: Automatic Identification of Best Answers in Online Enquiry Communities

Dataset:

32, 942 users were collected from 33 different forums between December 2003 and July 2011. Within those threads, we only select threads that have the best answers. Our final dataset consists of 29, 960 (32%) questions and 111, 719 (26%) answers.); Server Fault (SF) (Our SF dataset is extracted from the April 2011 public dataset, and consists of 71, 962 questions, 162, 401 answers and 51, 727 users. Within those questions, we selected only the questions that have the best answers. The final SF dataset consists of 36, 717 (51%) questions and 95, 367 (59%) answers.); Cooking community (CO) (CO is a smaller dataset with 3, 065 questions, 9, 820 answers and 4, 941 users.
